name: Brunswick Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin the chicken and boil until tender.
2. Broil the cooked beef until browned.
3. Debone the chicken, chop it into pieces, and blend in a blender.
4. Slowly cook the tomato juice, water, and onion for 30 minutes.
5. Add the beef bouillon, red pepper flakes, meat, and vinegar to the sauce.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Cook very slowly in a heavy pot until thickened.
